title: clinopodium glabellum
intro: Clinopodium glabellum, also known as Mountain Mint, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium glabellum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Mountain Mint can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and natural healing.
